X-H2S COMPANION

Tutorial · Presets · SOS · Manual · Exercises

Official manual

The complete text of all 404 pages is built into this app and searchable offline — search always works, even with no network. Opening a page also shows the real PDF page with illustrations (the PDF ships with the app, no network needed); if it hasn't been cached locally yet for some reason, the app automatically falls back to the built-in text view.

📥 Download the manual PDF (7 MB) 🌐 Online manual (web, Fujifilm)

Jump straight to a chapter

Text-only view (no illustrations, PDF unavailable) · Open the PDF externally instead
